title: Ultra Hardcore UHC
description: A lightweight UHC modpack designed for fast and competitive matches.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bec5fb212e8cb1c653b59e6736c98cf9427c7c3.png)

This modpack delivers a streamlined and competitive Ultra Hardcore (UHC) experience designed for quick setup and smooth gameplay. Instead of dealing with complex commands or external servers, you can start a match in seconds: just open your world to LAN and type /game open to instantly launch the UHC session for everyone connected.

Players begin with no natural health regeneration, encouraging strategic combat, careful resource gathering, and smart survival decisions. Mines, caves, and structures become dangerous battlegrounds where every heart lost is permanent. As the border tightens, players must prepare, fight, and outsmart each other to become the final survivor.

To ensure stable performance during fights, world generation, and border movement, this modpack includes several optimized performance mods. These enhancements reduce lag spikes, improve FPS, speed up chunk loading, and make PvP smoother—ideal for both casual matches and competitive play.

Whether you’re hosting quick UHC rounds with friends, practicing PvP, or running small tournaments, this modpack offers a polished, fast, and reliable UHC experience with simple controls, clean mechanics, and easy LAN setup. Every match is intense, strategic, and adrenaline-filled—exactly what UHC should be.
